name: invite
description: An invite link only visible to you

name: wtp timer
description: Enable or disable your personal WTP timer pings

name: collection add
description: Add a Pokemon to your collection

name: collection remove
description: Remove a Pokemon to your collection

name: collection remove
description: Remove a Pokemon to your collection

name: config
description: Edit your server's configuration if you have the Manage Messages permission.

name: setup wtp
description: Enable or disabler the WTP timer feature in your server

name: setup rarity
description: Add a rare to be pinged when Rare, Regional, or Event Pokemon spawn

name: setup collection limit
description: Set a limit for the amount of Pokemon your users can collect
